title: Die On Block
description: Kills player when they step on a specific block.
body:
Die On Block | Make a block dangerous!

Latest version: 1.1.0 for 1.13+

Ever wanted a plugin that can make blocks dangerous to players?
This is the right plugin! Die On Block (DOB for short) does just that. You can use it for various things. Examples include:

  • If I touch x, I die video
  • Parkour challenges
  • Pranks

    • OK, but how does it look like?

    Nice, but how does it work?

    You can use /dob to view usage.

    Whenever a player steps onto a block that has been set to be dangerous, it will kill the player instantly.

    You can set a few things - whether it affects OPs, whether it affects players in creative and what blocks should be dangerous.

    Keep in mind that some blocks might need different names. For example, BRICKS is known to be renamed to BRICK.

    What if I found a bug?

    Please message me on Discord: dottych



    Made by dottych
